runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at this track. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when seventh (23.26) at this track. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

runners.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 400m (23.45) beating Scotch Fever in Grade 5 on April 9. In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 400m (23.45) beating Scotch Fever in Grade 5 on April 9. In form and is right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Scored by one length last time (24.72) in a Grade 5 over 435m at Sale. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored by one length last time (24.72) in a Grade 5 over 435m at Sale. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 4.5 lengths seventh (23.76) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at Healesville. Has ability but this tough and will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (22.44) over 390m at Ballarat. Looking to others this time.

formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (22.44) over 390m at Ballarat. Looking to others this time.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3.5 lengths sixth (19.47) over 350m at Healesville. Has won seven races from this box. Expected to feature.
